Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Dumping Lego NXT firmware off of an existing brick (2025) 213 upvotes, 13 comments
  2. Emacs internals: Deconstructing Lisp_Object in C (Part 2) 80 upvotes, 6 comments
  3. CasNum 295 upvotes, 36 comments
  4. In 1985 Maxell built a bunch of life-size robots for its bad floppy ad 120 upvotes, 15 comments
  5. macOS code injection for fun and no profit (2024) 98 upvotes, 18 comments
  6. SWE-CI: Evaluating Agent Capabilities in Maintaining Codebases via CI 59 upvotes, 9 comments
  7. Sem – Semantic version control. Entity-level diffs on top of Git 30 upvotes, 3 comments
  8. Show HN: Curiosity – DIY 6" Newtonian Reflector Telescope 39 upvotes, 5 comments
  9. The Collective Ambition Behind Odysseus, a Game-Changing Sci-Fi Larp 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  10. Rijksmuseum researchers discover new painting by Rembrandt van Rijn 43 upvotes, 7 comments
  11. How to run Qwen 3.5 locally 216 upvotes, 60 comments
  12. Autoresearch: Agents researching on single-GPU nanochat training automatically 129 upvotes, 33 comments
  13. FLASH radiotherapy's bold approach to cancer treatment 214 upvotes, 65 comments
  14. Ten years of deploying to production 34 upvotes, 6 comments
  15. Apple's 512GB Mac Studio vanishes, a quiet acknowledgment of the RAM shortage 25 upvotes, 4 comments
  16. Digital Iris [video] 17 upvotes, 2 comments
  17. The Lobster Programming Language 20 upvotes, 3 comments
  18. The surprising whimsy of the Time Zone Database 132 upvotes, 45 comments
  19. To the Polypropylene Makers 42 upvotes, 11 comments
  20. Warn about PyPy being unmaintained 215 upvotes, 88 comments
  21. Cloud VM benchmarks 2026 261 upvotes, 119 comments
  22. From RGB to L*a*b* color space (2024) 49 upvotes, 16 comments
  23. Yoghurt delivery women combatting loneliness in Japan 308 upvotes, 163 comments
  24. Files are the interface humans and agents interact with 238 upvotes, 123 comments
  25. Show HN: A weird thing that detects your pulse from the browser video 91 upvotes, 42 comments
  26. Notes on Writing WASM 31 upvotes, 11 comments
  27. A decade of Docker containers 315 upvotes, 211 comments
  28. MonoGame: A .NET framework for making cross-platform games 87 upvotes, 58 comments
  29. Best performance of a C++ singleton 36 upvotes, 26 comments
  30. Fatbikes are wreaking havoc in Sydney's wealthy beach suburbs 19 upvotes, 30 comments

Last generated 8:00pm, 8 March 2026. Source here.
